## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / CI / chore
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `go test -race -shuffle=on ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is empty
- [ ] No secrets, hostnames, or private URLs in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands, scenarios, edge cases. -->
